strengths: Deep TypeScript and React expertise directly aligns with core tech stack
19+ years of fullstack experience demonstrates ability to learn across diverse tech stacks
Based in Berlin, enabling high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Massively overqualified: Staff-level engineer with 19 years experience applying for explicit entry-level IC role signals flight risk and salary/responsibility mismatch
Nine-month unexplained career gap plus only 6-month tenure at last role (re:cinq, Apr–Oct 2025) raises serious commitment concerns for junior IC position
PostgreSQL experience not listed despite being core to role; Nest.js framework expertise not mentioned despite being in required skills
response.justification: Bogdan is a Staff/Senior engineer applying for an explicit entry-level junior IC role, creating fundamental misalignment: overqualification increases flight risk, suggests expectation mismatch on scope and compensation, and implies he views this as temporary. The nine-month unexplained gap and 6-month recent tenure signal instability for a role seeking reliable junior development. While TypeScript and React skills are strong, the absence of PostgreSQL experience and lack of explicit Nest.js framework expertise represent gaps in the specific stack the role requires, compounded by his pattern of short tenures rather than deepening specialization in domains.
